assumption_text: Encode 'more than 1,600 civilians' as a conservative floor of 1,600.
rationale: This avoids implying precision beyond the retained wording.

assumption_text: Do not invent numeric ISIS- or SDF-attributed civilian death totals for the city assault.
rationale: The retained source chain emphasizes coalition-caused deaths and qualitative ISIS tactics, not a complete all-actor fatality ledger.
